title: 2 Night
overview: In a city where everything is possible, a guy and a girl are looking for the impossible - a parking place. the story of an hour and a half of two strangers who met in a bar and want to spend the night together but cant find a parking place and thus become 'victims' of the situation and have to deal each with the other, the situation and himself.

trailers.title: 2 Night - Trailer
trailers.channel_name: Roi Werner. Where Therapy Meets Technology
